---
title: "Interview: Mechanical Career Roadmap for Students"
date: 2026-01-05
description: "An alumni perspective on how to prepare for mechanical engineering opportunities."
image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1581092918484-8313b3ad67de?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
categories: [Interview, Mechanical]
---

Our guest shared a simple roadmap: build project depth, communicate clearly, and stay close to real industry problems from the start.
